report_name: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4-Cyber, a Specialized AI Model for Defensive Cybersecurity

tools.name: GPT-5.4-Cyber
tools.description: A specialized version of OpenAI's next-generation AI model, tailored specifically for defensive cybersecurity applications such as binary reverse engineering.

tools.name: Mythos
tools.description: A security-focused AI model from Anthropic, mentioned as a rival to GPT-5.4-Cyber.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: Developer of the GPT-5.4-Cyber model and the 'Trusted Access for Cyber' (TAC) program.

identities.name: JPMorgan Chase
identities.description: A major financial institution participating in the 'Trusted Access for Cyber' (TAC) program to use GPT-5.4-Cyber.
